vibe: Technical, professional, precise, authoritative, corporate, sober.

fonts.heading: Chivo
fonts.import_instructions: Import Chivo, IBM Plex Sans, and IBM Plex Mono from Google Fonts.

layout.container: w-full h-screen overflow-hidden bg-background text-slate-900 flex flex-col md:flex-row
layout.grid_system: flex-1 grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 h-full w-full

panels.main_workspace: col-span-1 md:col-span-8 lg:col-span-8 h-full flex flex-col border-r border-border overflow-y-auto bg-white
panels.copilot_sidebar: col-span-1 md:col-span-4 lg:col-span-4 h-full flex flex-col bg-gray-50 shadow-inner

layout.spacing: Dense spacing inside widgets (p-4), generous padding in major containers (p-8).

surface_strategy.cards: Flat solid surfaces with crisp 1px borders (border-slate-200), no soft drop shadows. Emphasize functional separation.
surface_strategy.buttons: Square or very subtly rounded (rounded-sm). Primary buttons use solid primary color (#002FA7) with white text. Secondary use transparent bg with border-slate-300.
surface_strategy.inputs: Shadcn default but with 0px or 2px max radius, ensuring a high-tech/engineering software feel.
surface_strategy.chat_bubbles: User: solid slate-800 with white text. AI Copilot: solid white with 1px border-slate-200. Errors in chat: border-l-4 border-red-600 bg-red-50 p-4.

motion_interactions.hover_states: Crisp transitions. Text color explicitly changes on hover. Backgrounds shift slightly (e.g. hover:bg-slate-100).
motion_interactions.transitions: Fast and snappy. 150ms ease-out. No bouncy spring animations. It is an engineering tool, not a toy.
motion_interactions.loaders: Linear progress bars or monospace ascii-style loading text (e.g. 'Analyzing node [#####.....]').

components.upload_zone: Large rectangular area, dashed border (border-2 border-dashed border-slate-300 hover:border-blue-600), filled with a very faint blueprint pattern. Center align icon and text.
components.chat_interface: Sticky bottom input, scrollable message history. High contrast labels.
components.error_card: A specific component for 'Detected Electrical Error'. Must include a red icon, exact normative reference (e.g. 'NEC 310.15' or 'REBT ITC-BT-19'), and a prominent 'Fix/Acknowledge' action.
components.summary_dashboard: Bento grid of data points at the top of the workspace (Project Title, Total Pages, Errors Found, Risk Level).

blueprint_empty_state.description: Subtle electrical blueprint to be used at 5-10% opacity inside the document upload dropzone to signal purpose.

server_room_cover.description: High-tech server room image. Can be used as a split-screen cover image on the login/auth page, with a very heavy dark blue overlay (bg-blue-900/80).

accessibility.contrast: Strict APCA/WCAG AA compliance. Dark text on light backgrounds. Error text must be readable (Red-700 on Red-50).
accessibility.test_ids: Every button, input, and chat message must have a data-testid attribute (e.g. 'upload-project-btn', 'chat-input', 'error-alert-card').

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the UI in React using standard HTML/Tailwind for layouts and heavily customized Shadcn for forms/inputs.

Create a strict split-screen layout for the main app view: the left side (col-span-8) is the 'Project Workspace' (Upload area initially, then shows Document Summary + detected errors), and the right side (col-span-4) is a persistent 'Copilot Chat'.
DO NOT use Inter font. Use Chivo for headings, IBM Plex Sans for body, and IBM Plex Mono for technical/error readouts.
In the Chat interface, style AI responses involving 'Electrical Errors' differently than normal text (use red borders or alert blocks).

Implement the Upload Zone with the provided blueprint background image (`blueprint_empty_state`) at a very low opacity (e.g., opacity-5 or opacity-10) to make it feel like a professional CAD/Electrical tool.
Make sure the MVP feels like 'senior engineer software', not a friendly chatbot. Avoid rounded bouncy UI; use sharp, precise boxes (rounded-sm or rounded-none).
